name: Nicotinamide riboside raised NAD metabolites but did not test DNA repair
summary: Human NR data provide context for NAD-linked DNA-repair hypotheses, but the cited trial does not directly measure DNA repair.
statement: In a small crossover trial, nicotinamide riboside was tolerated and raised NAD metabolism in healthy middle-aged and older adults, but DNA repair endpoints were not measured.
quantitative_note: Thirty participants were randomized and 24 completed the trial; the paper reports increased PBMC NAD+ and NAAD after NR.
caveats: This finding is contextual for NAD-linked DNA repair support, not direct evidence of DNA repair enhancement.
Study pills, standards, and partial funding support came from the NR product sponsor.
